metadata.description: Authoring tools for java-mcp in-place skills (path-as-identity skill trees shipped inside a library's jar).

plugins.name: skill-authoring
plugins.description: Guides a library author level-by-level (library → package → class/component → method) to author java-mcp skills in place under src/main/resources/META-INF/skills/, with correct path-as-identity naming, frontmatter, and per-node inventories.
